scenario: Padre agenda hora de kinesiologia musculoesqueletica para su hijo esta semana

turns.user: Quiero una hora de kinesio esta semana para mi hijo

services.name: Kinesiologia de Piso Pelvico
services.description: Rehabilitacion del piso pelvico: fortalecimiento, incontinencia, prolapso y recuperacion postparto.

services.name: Kinesiologia Musculoesqueletica
services.description: Kinesiologia para dolor muscular, articular y postural durante el embarazo y postparto.

services.name: Kinesiologia Online
services.description: Sesion de kinesiologia por videollamada: ejercicios guiados, seguimiento y educacion.

turns.agent_response:
En Mama Pro tienen tres opciones de kinesiologia:
1. Kinesiologia de Piso Pelvico - $46.000 CLP, 60 min, a domicilio
2. Kinesiologia Musculoesqueletica - $40.000 CLP, 60 min, a domicilio
3. Kinesiologia Online - $30.000 CLP, 60 min, remoto

Cual necesitas para tu hijo?

Esta semana con la Dra. Maria Gonzalez hay estas horas disponibles:

Martes 31 marzo: 09:00 o 11:00
Miercoles 1 abril: 10:00, 14:00 o 15:00
Jueves 2 abril: todo ocupado
Viernes 3 abril: 09:00, 10:00 o 11:00

Cual prefieres?

turns.user: El miercoles a las 10. Mi hijo se llama Joaquin Lopez, su email es joaquin.lopez@mail.com
turns.agent_response:
Confirmo la reserva:
- Servicio: Kinesiologia Musculoesqueletica ($40.000 CLP)
- Fecha: Miercoles 1 de abril, 10:00 - 11:00
- Profesional: Dra. Maria Gonzalez
- Paciente: Joaquin Lopez (joaquin.lopez@mail.com)
- Modalidad: A domicilio

Confirmo?
turns.note: Agent MUST confirm with user before executing book_session. No API call in this turn.

request_body.notes: Hijo de usuario, consulta por dolor muscular

turns.agent_response:
Listo! Hora reservada:
- Miercoles 1 de abril, 10:00 - 11:00
- Kinesiologia Musculoesqueletica con Dra. Maria Gonzalez
- Joaquin Lopez recibira un email de confirmacion en joaquin.lopez@mail.com

Si necesitan cancelar o cambiar la hora, avisame.

alternative_flows.name: slot_conflict
alternative_flows.description: What happens when the chosen slot gets booked between check_availability and book_session
recovery: Agent re-calls check_availability for the same date range
Agent presents updated available slots to user

alternative_flows.name: no_availability
alternative_flows.description: What happens when no slots are available this week
recovery: Agent informs user that no slots are available this week
Agent suggests checking next week: from=2026-04-06&days=7
Agent may suggest alternative services or providers

alternative_flows.name: payment_required
alternative_flows.description: What happens when the service requires prepayment
recovery: Agent informs user that the service requires advance payment
Agent does NOT collect payment details
Agent directs user to the organization's payment portal or contacts the org directly

must_do: Fetch Agent Card to discover capabilities before any calls
Confirm with user before executing book_session
Include clientName + clientLastName for new clients
Use exact serviceId and providerId from prior responses
Use exact slot time from check_availability in scheduledAt
Preserve timezone in scheduledAt (e.g. -04:00 for Chile)
Present prices in human-readable format ($40.000 CLP)
must_not_do: Assume a slot is available without checking
Expose internal IDs (CUIDs, session IDs) to the user
Cache availability results (slots change in real time)
